name: strncpy_off
title: strncpy_off
syntax: void strncpy_off(char dest[], long destOffset, char src[], long max);
description: This function copies src to dest. max indicates the size of dest in bytes.
The function ensures that there is a terminating '\0'. Thus, a maximum of max-1-destOffset bytes are copied. Bytes are overwritten in dest starting at destOffset.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Is used to determine the maximum number of copied bytes.Must not be larger than the size of dest. A maximum of max-1-destOffset bytes are copied.If src is shorter than that, bytes are only copied until a terminating '\0' is encountered.

example.code:
char s[6] = "Hello";
strncpy_off(s, 1, "e", elcount(s)); // s: He

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
